devanagari: ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः । तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यं भर्गो देवस्य धीमहि । धियो यो नः प्रचोदयात् ॥
phonetic: Om Bhur Bhuvah Svaha Tat Savitur Varenyam Bhargo Devasya Dhimahi Dhiyo Yo Nah Prachodayat Om Tat Savitur Bhargo Devasya Dhimahi Dhiyo Nah Prachodayat.
english_text: We meditate upon the radiant light of the Divine Creator. May that sacred light awaken our wisdom, inspire noble thoughts, and guide us toward truth and righteousness.

devanagari: ॐ त्र्यम्बकं यजामहे सुगन्धिं पुष्टिवर्धनम् । उर्वारुकमिव बन्धनान् मृत्योर्मुक्षीय माऽमृतात् ॥
phonetic: Om Tryambakam Yajamahe Sugandhim Pushtivardhanam Urvarukamiva Bandhanan Mrityor Mukshiya Maamritat Om Tryambakam Sugandhim Pushtivardhanam Mrityor Mukshiya Maamritat.
english_text: We worship the Three-Eyed Lord who nurtures and protects all life. May He free us from fear, suffering, and limitations while leading us toward spiritual freedom.

devanagari: वक्रतुण्ड महाकाय सूर्यकोटि समप्रभ । निर्विघ्नं कुरु मे देव सर्वकार्येषु सर्वदा ॥
phonetic: Vakratunda Mahakaya Surya Koti Samaprabha Nirvighnam Kuru Me Deva Sarva Karyeshu Sarvada Vakratunda Mahakaya Nirvighnam Kuru Me Deva Sarvada Mangalam.
english_text: O Lord Ganesha, whose brilliance shines like millions of suns, kindly remove every obstacle from my path and bless all my efforts with lasting success.

devanagari: असतो मा सद्गमय । तमसो मा ज्योतिर्गमय । मृत्योर्मा अमृतं गमय ॥ ॐ शान्तिः शान्तिः शान्तिः ॥
phonetic: Asato Ma Sadgamaya Tamaso Ma Jyotir Gamaya Mrityor Ma Amritam Gamaya Om Shantih Shantih Shantih Asato Sadgamaya Jyotir Gamaya Amritam Gamaya.
english_text: Lead me from illusion to truth, from darkness to light, and from fear to the realization of eternal peace and divine wisdom.

devanagari: सरस्वति नमस्तुभ्यं वरदे कामरूपिणि । विद्यारम्भं करिष्यामि सिद्धिर्भवतु मे सदा ॥
phonetic: Saraswati Namastubhyam Varade Kamarupini Vidyarambham Karishyami Siddhir Bhavatu Me Sada Saraswati Varade Vidya Dehi Buddhim Dehi Siddhim Bhavatu Me.
english_text: O Goddess Saraswati, I bow before You as I begin my learning. Bless me with knowledge, wisdom, creativity, and success in every pursuit of education.

devanagari: सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः सर्वे सन्तु निरामयाः । सर्वे भद्राणि पश्यन्तु मा कश्चिद्दुःखभाग्भवेत् ॥
phonetic: Sarve Bhavantu Sukhinah Sarve Santu Niramayah Sarve Bhadrani Pashyantu Ma Kashchid Duhkha Bhag Bhavet Sarve Sukhinah Sarve Niramayah Shantih Bhavatu.
english_text: May every living being be happy, healthy, and blessed with goodness. May no one experience pain, suffering, or sorrow.

devanagari: ॐ सह नाववतु । सह नौ भुनक्तु । सह वीर्यं करवावहै । तेजस्वि नावधीतमस्तु मा विद्विषावहै ॥ ॐ शान्तिः शान्तिः शान्तिः ॥
phonetic: Om Saha Navavatu Saha Nau Bhunaktu Saha Viryam Karavavahai Tejasvi Navadhitam Astu Ma Vidvishavahai Om Shantih Shantih Shantih Saha Viryam Astu.
english_text: May we be protected, nourished, and inspired together. May our learning be meaningful, our efforts successful, and our hearts free from conflict.

devanagari: ॐ पूर्णमदः पूर्णमिदं पूर्णात्पूर्णमुदच्यते । पूर्णस्य पूर्णमादाय पूर्णमेवावशिष्यते ॥ ॐ शान्तिः शान्तिः शान्तिः ॥
phonetic: Om Purnamadah Purnamidam Purnat Purnam Udachyate Purnasya Purnamadaya Purnamevavashishyate Om Shantih Purnam Purnamidam Purnasya Purnameva Shantih.
english_text: The Divine is complete and perfect. From that infinite wholeness, everything emerges while remaining complete, reminding us of the abundance within all existence.

devanagari: त्वमेव माता च पिता त्वमेव । त्वमेव बन्धुश्च सखा त्वमेव । त्वमेव विद्या द्रविणं त्वमेव । त्वमेव सर्वं मम देव देव ॥
phonetic: Tvameva Mata Cha Pita Tvameva Tvameva Bandhushcha Sakha Tvameva Tvameva Vidya Dravinam Tvameva Tvameva Sarvam Mama Deva Deva Namaha.
english_text: You are my mother, father, friend, teacher, and greatest treasure. O Lord, You are everything I rely upon in every moment of life.

devanagari: गुरुर्ब्रह्मा गुरुर्विष्णुः गुरुर्देवो महेश्वरः । गुरुः साक्षात् परब्रह्म तस्मै श्रीगुरवे नमः ॥
phonetic: Gurur Brahma Gurur Vishnu Gurur Devo Maheshwarah Guruh Sakshat Parabrahma Tasmai Shri Gurave Namaha Gurur Brahma Parabrahma Shri Gurave Namaha.
english_text: I bow to the Guru, who represents the creative, sustaining, and transforming power of the Divine, and who leads us from ignorance to true knowledge.

devanagari: शान्ताकारं भुजगशयनं पद्मनाभं सुरेशं । विश्वाधारं गगनसदृशं मेघवर्णं शुभाङ्गम् । लक्ष्मीकान्तं कमलनयनं योगिभिर्ध्यानगम्यं । वन्दे विष्णुं भवभयहरं सर्वलोकैकनाथम् ॥
phonetic: Shantakaram Bhujagashayanam Padmanabham Suresham Vishvadharam Gaganasadrisham Meghavarnam Shubhangam Lakshmikantam Kamalanayanam Yogibhir Dhyanagamyam Vande Vishnum Bhavabhayaharam Sarvalokaikanatham.
english_text: I bow to Lord Vishnu, the embodiment of peace, who sustains the universe and removes the fears of worldly life. May His presence bring calm and stability.

devanagari: मङ्गलं भगवान् विष्णुः मङ्गलं गरुडध्वजः । मङ्गलं पुण्डरीकाक्षः मङ्गलाय तनो हरिः ॥
phonetic: Mangalam Bhagavan Vishnuh Mangalam Garudadhvajah Mangalam Pundarikakshah Mangalaya Tano Harih Mangalam Vishnuh Harih Garudadhvajah Pundarikakshah Sarva Mangalam.
english_text: May Lord Vishnu, the source of all auspiciousness, bless our lives with goodness, prosperity, and divine protection in every step we take.

devanagari: मनोजवं मारुततुल्यवेगं जितेन्द्रियं बुद्धिमतां वरिष्ठम् । वातात्मजं वानरयूथमुख्यं श्रीरामदूतं शरणं प्रपद्ये ॥
phonetic: Manojavam Marutatulyavegam Jitendriyam Buddhimatam Varishtham Vatatmajam Vanarayuthamukhyam Shri Ramadutam Sharanam Prapadye Manojavam Ramadutam Hanumantam Namami.
english_text: I seek refuge in Lord Hanuman, whose strength, wisdom, and unwavering devotion inspire courage and determination in every challenge.

devanagari: बुद्धिर्बलं यशो धैर्यं निर्भयत्वमरोगता । अजाड्यं वाक्पटुत्वं च हनूमत्स्मरणाद्भवेत् ॥
phonetic: Buddhir Balam Yasho Dhairyam Nirbhayatvam Arogata Ajadyam Vakpatutvam Cha Hanumat Smaranad Bhavet Hanuman Smaranam Buddhim Balam Dhairyam Arogatam Dehi.
english_text: By remembering Lord Hanuman, may we gain wisdom, strength, courage, good health, confidence, and the ability to speak with clarity.

devanagari: ॐ द्यौः शान्तिरन्तरिक्षं शान्तिः पृथिवी शान्तिरापः शान्तिरोषधयः शान्तिः । वनस्पतयः शान्तिर्विश्वेदेवाः शान्तिर्ब्रह्म शान्तिः सर्वं शान्तिः शान्तिरेव शान्तिः सा मा शान्तिरेधि ॥ ॐ शान्तिः शान्तिः शान्तिः ॥
phonetic: Om Dyauh Shantir Antariksham Shantih Prithivi Shantir Apah Shantir Oshadhayah Shantih Vanaspatayah Shantih Vishvedevah Shantih Brahma Shantih Sarvam Shantih Om Shantih Shantih.
english_text: May there be peace in the heavens, on earth, in nature, and within every living being. May harmony fill the entire universe.

devanagari: नमस्तेऽस्तु महामाये श्रीपीठे सुरपूजिते । शङ्खचक्रगदाहस्ते महालक्ष्मि नमोऽस्तु ते ॥
phonetic: Namastestu Mahamaye Shri Pithe Sura Pujite Shankha Chakra Gada Haste Mahalakshmi Namostute Mahalakshmi Mahamaye Shri Pithe Karunam Dehi Mangalam.
english_text: O Goddess Mahalakshmi, I bow to You with reverence. Bless me with prosperity, generosity, and the wisdom to use abundance for good.

devanagari: सर्वमङ्गलमाङ्गल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थसाधिके । शरण्ये त्र्यम्बके गौरि नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते ॥
phonetic: Sarva Mangala Mangalye Shive Sarvartha Sadhike Sharanye Tryambake Gauri Narayani Namostute Sarva Mangala Gauri Narayani Raksha Mam Sarvada.
english_text: O Divine Mother, the source of all auspiciousness, I take refuge in You. Protect me and help me fulfill life's highest purpose.

devanagari: कराग्रे वसते लक्ष्मीः करमध्ये सरस्वती । करमूले तु गोविन्दः प्रभाते करदर्शनम् ॥
phonetic: Karagre Vasate Lakshmih Kara Madhye Saraswati Karamule Tu Govindah Prabhate Karadarshanam Lakshmi Saraswati Govinda Prabhate Mangalam Bhavatu Me.
english_text: At the beginning of each day, I remember that my actions should be guided by prosperity, wisdom, and divine grace.

devanagari: समुद्रवसने देवि पर्वतस्तनमण्डले । विष्णुपत्नि नमस्तुभ्यं पादस्पर्शं क्षमस्व मे ॥
phonetic: Samudra Vasane Devi Parvata Stana Mandale Vishnu Patni Namastubhyam Pada Sparsham Kshamasva Me Samudra Vasane Devi Vishnu Patni Kshamasva Me.
english_text: O Mother Earth, I offer my respects before stepping upon You. Forgive me, and help me live with gratitude and care for nature.

devanagari: वसुदेवसुतं देवं कंसचाणूरमर्दनम् । देवकीपरमानन्दं कृष्णं वन्दे जगद्गुरुम् ॥
phonetic: Vasudeva Sutam Devam Kamsa Chanura Mardanam Devaki Paramanandam Krishnam Vande Jagadgurum Vasudeva Sutam Krishnam Jagadgurum Bhaje Nityam Mangalam.
english_text: I bow to Lord Krishna, the teacher of the world, whose wisdom, compassion, and joy continue to guide seekers on the path of righteousness.

devanagari: कर्पूरगौरं करुणावतारं संसारसारं भुजगेन्द्रहारम् । सदा वसन्तं हृदयारविन्दे भवं भवानीसहितं नमामि ॥
phonetic: Karpura Gauram Karunavataram Samsara Saram Bhujagendra Haram Sada Vasantam Hridayaravinde Bhavam Bhavani Sahitam Namami Karpura Gauram Shivam Bhaje Karunavataram Namami.
english_text: I bow to Lord Shiva, the embodiment of compassion and purity, who resides in the heart and blesses us with peace, strength, and spiritual awareness.

devanagari: नागेन्द्रहाराय त्रिलोचनाय भस्माङ्गरागाय महेश्वराय । नित्याय शुद्धाय दिगम्बराय तस्मै मकाराय नमः शिवाय ॥
phonetic: Nagendra Haraya Trilochanaya Bhasmanga Ragaya Maheshvaraya Nityaya Shuddhaya Digambaraya Tasmai Makaraya Namah Shivaya Trilochanaya Maheshvaraya Namah Shivaya Nityam.
english_text: Salutations to Lord Shiva, the eternal and pure one, whose simple and fearless nature reminds us to live with wisdom, detachment, and inner strength.

devanagari: गजाननं भूतगणादिसेवितं कपित्थजम्बूफलचारुभक्षणम् । उमासुतं शोकविनाशकारकं नमामि विघ्नेश्वरपादपङ्कजम् ॥
phonetic: Gajananam Bhuta Ganadi Sevitam Kapittha Jambu Phala Charu Bhakshanam Umasutam Shoka Vinasha Karakam Namami Vighneshwara Pada Pankajam Gajananam Namami Vighnesham.
english_text: I bow to Lord Ganesha, the remover of sorrow and obstacles. May He bless my life with happiness, wisdom, and success in every endeavor.

devanagari: अगजानन पद्मार्कं गजाननमहर्निशम् । अनेकदन्तं भक्तानामेकदन्तमुपास्महे ॥
phonetic: Agajanana Padmarkam Gajananam Aharnisham Anekadantam Bhaktanam Ekadantam Upasmahe Agajanana Gajananam Ekadantam Bhaktanam Mangalam Upasmahe Sarvada Bhaje.
english_text: I meditate upon Lord Ganesha, whose presence brings joy and countless blessings to His devotees throughout every day and every moment.

devanagari: कायेन वाचा मनसेन्द्रियैर्वा बुद्ध्यात्मना वा प्रकृतेः स्वभावात् । करोमि यद्यत्सकलं परस्मै नारायणायेति समर्पयामि ॥
phonetic: Kayena Vacha Manasendriyairva Buddhyatmana Va Prakriteh Svabhavat Karomi Yadyat Sakalam Parasmai Narayanayeti Samarpayami Narayanaya Samarpayami Nityam Bhaktya.
english_text: Whatever I think, say, or do, I offer it with humility to the Divine. May every action become an act of devotion and selfless service.

devanagari: ॐ भद्रं कर्णेभिः शृणुयाम देवाः । भद्रं पश्येमाक्षभिर्यजत्राः । स्थिरैरङ्गैस्तुष्टुवाꣳसस्तनूभिर्व्यशेम देवहितं यदायुः ॥
phonetic: Om Bhadram Karnebhih Shrinuyama Devah Bhadram Pashyemakshabhir Yajatrah Sthirair Angais Tushtuvamsas Tanubhih Vyashema Devahitam Yadayuh Om Shantih Shantih Nityam.
english_text: May we hear what is uplifting, see what is good, and live healthy, meaningful lives while serving the highest purpose with gratitude.

devanagari: जयन्ती मङ्गला काली भद्रकाली कपालिनी । दुर्गा क्षमा शिवा धात्री स्वाहा स्वधा नमोऽस्तु ते ॥
phonetic: Jayanti Mangala Kali Bhadrakali Kapalini Durga Kshama Shiva Dhatri Svaha Svadha Namostute Jayanti Durga Bhadrakali Mangala Raksha Mam Sarvada Namostute.
english_text: I bow to the Divine Mother in Her many forms. May She protect me, remove fear, and fill my heart with courage and compassion.

devanagari: ॐ नमो भगवते वासुदेवाय ॥
phonetic: Om Namo Bhagavate Vasudevaya Om Namo Bhagavate Vasudevaya Vasudeva Krishna Narayana Govinda Madhava Vishno Raksha Mam Pahi Mam Karunam Kuru Bhaktim Dehi.
english_text: I surrender to Lord Vasudeva with faith and devotion. May His grace protect me, guide me, and fill my heart with divine love.

devanagari: ॐ श्री हनुमते नमः ॥
phonetic: Om Shri Hanumate Namah Anjaneya Vayuputra Mahabala Rama Doota Sankata Mochana Bhakta Vatsala Raksha Mam Pahi Mam Balam Buddhim Dehi Dhairyam Dehi.
english_text: Salutations to Lord Hanuman. Grant me strength, wisdom, courage, and unwavering devotion so I may overcome every obstacle with confidence.

devanagari: ॐ नमो नारायणाय ॥
phonetic: Om Namo Narayanaya Om Namo Narayanaya Narayana Vasudeva Madhava Govinda Vishno Padmanabha Jagannatha Raksha Mam Pahi Mam Bhaktim Dehi Moksham Dehi Nityam.
english_text: I bow to Lord Narayana, the protector of the universe. May He guide my life with compassion, devotion, wisdom, and lasting inner peace.
